method_atom: a statistic that estimates the conditional mean of the most extreme fraction of a sample distribution beyond a fixed quantile threshold, satisfying a set of coherence axioms (monotonicity, positive homogeneity, translation invariance, and subadditivity) and admitting several equivalent representations suited to different purposes
object_atom: the downside risk of a financial portfolio, characterized from a sample of returns as a coherent alternative to Value at Risk at a fixed confidence level
brief_reason: the coherent tail-average estimator over a distribution's worst-case quantile region is the transferable machinery; the portfolio-returns risk-measurement setting is the finance-specific object.
